fallback_action: If this action fails, create a 50-word story.

recipe.steps: Create a 100-word story in the following format: (character 1 name) character 1 dialogue. (character 2 name) their dialogue and repeat this format till the end of the story making the story engaging, profound, and pushing the limits of human psychology.
Save the created story in memory using the save_data_in_memory tool.
Confirm the completion of the task with the StatusVerifier agent.
After confirmation, request the next action from the ChatInstructor.
